name: LatLong
summary: The LatLong class contains various methods for creating and manipulating latitude and longitude coordinates.

constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The new method creates a LatLong object.
constructors.remarks: The new method creates a LatLong object.

methods.name: latitude
methods.summary: The Latitude method retrieves the latitude coordinate from a LatLong object.
methods.remarks: The Latitude method retrieves the latitude coordinate from a LatLong object.

methods.name: longitude
methods.summary: The Latitude method retrieves the longitude coordinate from a LatLong object.
methods.remarks: The Latitude method retrieves the longitude coordinate from a LatLong object.

methods.name: to_a
methods.summary: The #to_a method converts a LatLong object to an array of two values.
methods.remarks: The #to_a method converts a LatLong object to an array of two values.

returns.doc: an array of latitude and longitude

methods.name: to_s
methods.summary: The #to_s method converts a LatLong object to a String.
methods.remarks: The #to_s method converts a LatLong object to a String.

methods.name: to_utm
methods.summary: The to_utm method converts a LatLong object to a UTM object.
methods.remarks: The to_utm method converts a LatLong object to a UTM object.
